# Hami Tahm — AI Visibility Consultant

> Hami Tahm is an AI Visibility Consultant based in Toronto, Canada. He helps businesses get cited, recommended, and represented across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Claude, Gemini, and Bing Copilot. The primary offer is a flat-fee AI Visibility Audit at $1,500 CAD with a 7-business-day turnaround. Every audit is conducted personally — no agency layer, no junior team.

Hami is the founder of HomeCalc.ca (Canadian personal-finance calculators) and Houmse.com (real-estate technology). His audit methodology produced 7,400+ AI citations across 25+ pages within 3 months on a YMYL financial site under three months old — without traditional domain authority — now commanding up to 76% citation share on key Canadian financial queries. That figure is measured in Bing Webmaster Tools' AI Performance report (Microsoft Copilot and partners); ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini and Google AI Overviews do not report citation counts to publishers. The case study is public and verifiable.

The site is structured as a small commercial cluster: a hub page for AI Visibility, a primary money page for the Audit, service variants (consultant Canada, consultant Toronto, AEO consultant, GEO consultant), a done-for-you Implementation Sprint page, two vertical pages (dental clinics, mortgage brokers), and one named case study. The service ladder is: free AI Visibility Checker (lead-in) → AI Visibility Audit ($1,500 CAD, one-time) → optional Implementation Sprint (done-for-you, from $4,500 CAD, audit fee credited) → optional Monitoring & Advisory (from $2,500/mo, fixed 6–12 month term). There is no free full audit. No retainer is required to get started; the monthly monitoring tier is optional and term-limited, offered only after the sprint.

## Primary service

- [AI Visibility Audit](https://hamitahm.com/ai-visibility/ai-visibility-audit/): $1,500 CAD flat-fee, one-time. Structured review across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Claude, Gemini, and Bing Copilot. Written report + prioritized action plan + 60-minute walkthrough call + 14 days of follow-up access. Delivered within 7 business days. This is the entry point for every engagement.
- [Free AI Visibility Checker](https://hamitahm.com/ai-visibility/ai-visibility-checker/): Free lead-in tool. Enter your domain, keywords, and country and choose engines (ChatGPT, Google AI Overview, Gemini live now; AI Mode, Perplexity, Claude, Grok coming soon). Not an automated score — a real analyst checks how each engine answers for you and emails a personalized report within one business day. The no-cost on-ramp to the paid audit.

## Service variants

- [AI Visibility Consultant in Canada](https://hamitahm.com/ai-visibility/ai-visibility-consultant-canada/): General consulting page covering all AI visibility services for Canadian businesses.
- [Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) Consultant](https://hamitahm.com/ai-visibility/answer-engine-optimization-consultant-canada/): AEO is page-level optimization — structuring existing content so AI engines can extract direct answers. Distinct from SEO (ranking) and from GEO (entity-level positioning).
- [Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) Consultant](https://hamitahm.com/ai-visibility/generative-engine-optimization-consultant-canada/): GEO is entity-level positioning — building the signals AI models use to recognize and represent your brand across the web. Distinct from AEO (extraction from your own pages).
- [AI Visibility Consultant in Toronto](https://hamitahm.com/ai-visibility/ai-visibility-consultant-toronto/): Local cornerstone for Toronto and the GTA — AEO and GEO for Toronto businesses, with a ProfessionalService entity (111 Peter Street) and near-me query intent.
- [AI Visibility Implementation Sprint](https://hamitahm.com/ai-visibility/implementation/): Done-for-you tier. After the audit, Hami implements the fixes himself — schema, rendering, entity consistency, page rewrites, crawler configuration. From $4,500 CAD, fixed scope, audit fee credited. Optional Monitoring & Advisory (from $2,500/mo, fixed 6–12 month term) is available afterward.

## Vertical pages

- [AI Visibility for Dental Clinics](https://hamitahm.com/ai-visibility/ai-visibility-for-dental-clinics/): Patients increasingly ask AI tools for dentist recommendations instead of opening Google. This page covers what an AI visibility audit checks for dental practices — including specialty practices (implants, Invisalign, cosmetic), solo owners, multi-location groups, and dental marketing agencies.
- [AI Visibility for Mortgage Brokers](https://hamitahm.com/ai-visibility/ai-visibility-for-mortgage-brokers/): Buyers research mortgage options through AI before contacting any broker. This page covers AI visibility specifics for mortgage professionals in Canada.

## Hub

- [AI Visibility](https://hamitahm.com/ai-visibility/): Cluster hub explaining AI visibility, the services on offer, and the relationship between SEO, AEO, and GEO. Routes to the audit and all service variants.

## Proof

- [AI Visibility Case Studies](https://hamitahm.com/case-studies/): Index of documented AI visibility results — the HomeCalc.ca named-client case study and the self-referential "AI engines recommend Hami Tahm" snapshot.
- [HomeCalc.ca — AI Visibility Case Study](https://hamitahm.com/case-studies/homecalc-ai-visibility/): How HomeCalc.ca went from near-zero AI citations to 7,400+ in 3 months, on a YMYL financial site under three months old, across 25+ cited pages — measured in Bing Webmaster Tools' AI Performance report (Microsoft Copilot) — now commanding up to 76% citation share on key Canadian financial queries. Includes named client, before/after metrics, top performing pages, and top grounding queries.
- [AI Engines Already Recommend Hami Tahm — Case Study](https://hamitahm.com/case-studies/cited-by-ai-engines/): A dated snapshot (June 2026) showing that when buyers ask ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Mode, and Grok who does AI visibility in Toronto or Canada, the engines recommend Hami Tahm by name and cite hamitahm.com. The self-referential proof of the audit's core outcome — getting recommended by AI engines.

## About

- [Hami Tahm](https://hamitahm.com/hami-tahm/): Bio, background, knowledge areas, and contact information. Toronto-based, Canada-served, founder of HomeCalc.ca and Houmse.com.

## Homepage

- [hamitahm.com](https://hamitahm.com/): Brand homepage with positioning, recent work, and entry points to all services.

## Contact and pricing

Engagements start at $1,500 CAD (flat fee, one-time) for the AI Visibility Audit. After the audit, clients can either implement the plan themselves or have Hami implement it for them as a fixed-scope Implementation Sprint (done-for-you, from $4,500 CAD; the audit fee is credited toward it). An optional Monitoring & Advisory engagement (from $2,500/mo, on a fixed 6–12 month term) is available after the sprint. A free AI Visibility Checker is the no-cost lead-in. No retainer is required to get started; ongoing monitoring is optional and term-limited. Email: hami@hamitahm.com. Service area: primarily Canada, with selective US and UK clients.

## What this site is not

- Not an SEO agency. AEO and GEO are distinct disciplines from traditional SEO.
- Not a tools vendor. The audit is consultant-led; tool dashboards are useful but not a substitute.
- Not a content mill. Each audit is performed personally by Hami Tahm; no junior team.

## Site metadata

- Founded: 2024 (hamitahm.com domain). AI visibility consultancy positioning since May 31, 2026.
- Language: English (en-CA)
- Owner: Hami Tahm (Toronto, ON, Canada)
- Schema: Person and Organization entities canonical at `https://hamitahm.com/#hami-tahm` and `https://hamitahm.com/#organization`
